name: Private School Bus Contract
registry_source: PA Department of State Business Entity Search
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER carrier record matches the literal name 'Private School Bus Contract'. The SAFER keyword search returned 'no records matching PRIVATE SCHOOL BUS CONTRACT.' The Meshoppen, PA address (RR 2 Box 331b) does not correspond to any obvious school bus carrier in SAFER. The only registered carrier in Meshoppen at a similar style address is MESHOPPEN TRANSPORT INC (USDOT 1102326, 131 Frantz Rd, Meshoppen PA 18630) but that carrier is an authorized for-hire PROPERTY carrier (91 power units, 73 drivers, Satisfactory safety rating 10/16/2009) — not a passenger/school-bus operator — and the address does not match. Likely the source list is using a generic descriptor ('private school bus contract') rather than a real registered entity name. PA Department of State entity search yielded no exact match for 'Private School Bus Contract Inc/LLC'. Lookup unconfirmed.

name: Ezra International Entertainer
officers: Ezra Zahavi (principal); CEO listed as EZRA TOURS INC. at same Flushing address
registry_source: NY Department of State, Division of Corporations (DOS ID 2908210, EZRA TOURS INC.)
notes: SAFER keyword search for 'EZRA INTERNATIONAL ENTERTAINER' returns 'no records matching' — this is NOT a registered FMCSA motor carrier. The address 144-35 69th Ave, Flushing NY 11367 corresponds to EZRA TOURS INC. (NY DOS ID 2908210, incorporated 5/19/2003) and a related d/b/a 'Ezra Tours & Travel Agency' / 'Ezra International'. The entity operates as a TRAVEL AGENCY / tour operator, not as a motor carrier, which is why no USDOT exists. State registry data above is for the related EZRA TOURS INC. entity at the matching address. No officer/principal data beyond Ezra Zahavi; small business (~1-4 employees per third-party directories).

name: Towne Bus Corp
officers: Bart D. Marksohn (CEO historically); Judith Crawford listed as CEO on most recent filing (3700 Embassy Parkway Suite 500, Akron, OH 44333); founded by Walter and Edie Marksohn; Registered Agent: C T Corporation System (28 Liberty St, New York, NY 10005)
registry_source: NY Department of State, Division of Corporations (DOS ID 295517)
notes: Strong match — SAFER address (75 Commercial St, Plainview NY 11803) exactly matches input address. Long Island school bus operator serving Nassau, Suffolk, NYC, Westchester, and Bridgeport CT districts. Fleet composition: 324 school buses (16+ passengers) and 265 buses (16+ passengers); 565 drivers. Akron OH mailing address on recent filings suggests affiliation with a parent (Student Transportation of America has Akron-area presence; current CEO Judith Crawford). No safety rating assigned. No inspections, crashes or safety violations reported in 24 months prior to 6/3/2026.

name: Star Trans Bus
officers: unknown (operates as a brand/division of Forest River Bus, LLC, ultimately owned by Berkshire Hathaway; previously a division of Supreme Corp/Supreme Indiana Operations until 3/31/2014)
registry_source: Indiana Secretary of State INBiz (no exact match for 'Star Trans Bus' as an independent entity)
notes: Not a motor carrier — 'Star Trans Bus' (StarTrans Bus) at 2592 (or 2581) Kercher Rd, Goshen IN 46528 is a small-to-mid-size shuttle BUS MANUFACTURER, not an FMCSA-registered carrier. It is a brand/division of Forest River Bus, LLC (Forest River Inc., Berkshire Hathaway subsidiary), based in Goshen IN. Acquired by Forest River from Supreme Corp on 3/31/2014. SAFER keyword search 'STAR TRANS BUS' returns no records. The closest SAFER hit (STAR TRANS LLC, USDOT 3567886) is a 5-unit private interstate carrier in State College, PA — different entity and address, NOT a match. As a manufacturer, this target is not a tuck-in candidate for Summit School Services (operator roll-up).
